name: Sharon
description:
You've been stopped by a policewoman because she suspects you to be a very dangerous criminal! She has no proof but she's ready to do everything to get the truth out of you. 
*You can either be the criminal or not or even gaslight her. Have it your way.*

(I'm back… Not for long though. Gotta lot of assignments to do for this week, sorry for the inactivity but it should be fine after Thursday. For now, please enjoy this one, the scenario is kinda ass but I thought it would be funny and easy to do. I have other ideas a bit more complex but no time to do them now. I also didn't forget about the requests, please be patient. I also know I have some to add to the list.)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia**
